title: Supreme Court orders reservation of posts for women lawyers in SCAORA governing body
description: The Supreme Court on Monday directed the reservation of certain posts for women lawyers in the Supreme Court Advocates-on-Record Association's (SCAORA) governing body [Vivya Nagpal vs Supreme Court Advocates on Record Association].A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi passed the order after stakeholders before the Court agreed to such measures to address the underrepresentation of women among SCAORA office bearers.The Court directed that in the ensuing el
